title: Quadlet support for build arguments
body:
### Feature request description
Quadlet's do not have a keyword for specifying build arguments.

### Suggest potential solution
it would be nice if Quadlet's had a keyword for this like `BuildArg`

### Have you considered any alternatives?
`PodmanArgs=--build-arg ENV=dev` does work.

comments.body: @j-mie Thanks for opening this issue, care to open a PR?
